subject: Mozi Minute: How To Ask For Referrals on Sales Calls
body:
Words I like: Nothing will net you more money per second than asking for referrals. Over 30% of your sales can come from this one question.

Mozi Minute: Always Ask For Referrals

I had one sales rep outperforming all benchmarks by 50%.

We kept listening to his calls trying to figure out what he was doing differently.

Everything sounded normal until I sat down with him.

Turns out, after collecting the card, he was doing one extra thing that everyone else was skipping.

He asked for referrals. Every. Single. Time.

The 4-Step Referral Process:

Step 1: Compliment Them
"You're the exact type of [business owner] we love to work with."

Step 2: Get Introduction
"Who else do you know who's as successful as you that would benefit from this?"

Step 3: Give Them Words To Use
Make it dead simple. Give them the exact words.

Step 4: Get More Introductions
"Great - anyone else come to mind?"

Why This Works:
Business owners know what you're doing. And they wish their team did it.

The Numbers:
Over 30% of your sales should come from referrals.
If they don't, your team isn't asking.

Bottom Line:
Every closed sale should end with a referral ask. Not sometimes. Every time.

Talk soon,
- Alex
